entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where agricultural diversification towards high value commodities is occurring.

entities.name: HIGH VALUE COMMODITIES
entities.description: Agricultural products such as fruits, vegetables, and livestock products that have a higher market value.

entities.name: FRUITS
entities.description: A type of high value commodity.

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: A type of high value commodity.

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTS
entities.description: Products derived from livestock, categorized as high value commodities.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total output of agricultural activities in various districts.

entities.name: ACCESS TO MARKETS
entities.description: The ability to reach consumers, defined by demand and transport factors.

entities.name: DEMAND
entities.description: The consumer requirement for high value commodities.

entities.name: TRANSPORT
entities.description: The movement of commodities from production sites to consumption centres.

entities.name: REGIONAL AGRICULTURAL PLANNING
entities.description: The process of planning agricultural activities at a regional level based on HVC variations.

entities.name: INVESTMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Public and private sector plans for allocating financial resources in agriculture.

entities.name: URBANISATION
entities.description: The process of making an area more urban, influencing the shift to high value agriculture.

entities.name: INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: The basic physical and organizational structures needed for the operation of agricultural markets.
